# olegotka.es

Portfolio and micro-agency site for premium iOS MVP development.

Useful resources:

- Homepage: https://olegotka.es/
- Markdown homepage: https://olegotka.es/index.md
- API catalog: https://olegotka.es/.well-known/api-catalog
- OpenAPI description: https://olegotka.es/openapi.json
- Agent card: https://olegotka.es/.well-known/agent-card.json
- Agent skills: https://olegotka.es/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json
- MCP server card: https://olegotka.es/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json

Contact:

- Booking: https://cal.com/olegotka/first-call
- Email: hello@olegotka.es
